markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and align on the Cashflow Desk content strategy and website V1.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** The content strategy was approved, targeting founders/operators and finance managers with a "Wealthsimple meets Investopedia" style.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Topic Clusters Set:** Three core clusters (Finance Ops, Modern Stack, Strategic Finance) and three verticals (Professional Services, E-commerce, SaaS) were approved.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [**Website V1 Approved:** The website layout was approved; GrowthX will now apply the new branding and load initial articles for a final review.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** RAMP to review the strategy doc by EOD tomorrow. GrowthX will deliver an Airtable topic list tomorrow and a full content OS next week.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

## Topics

### Publication Context & Audience

  - [**Positioning:** Occupy the space between basic bookkeeping and high-level CFO strategy, focusing on the 20% of finance knowledge that drives 80% of value.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**Editorial Style:** "Wealthsimple Magazine meets Investopedia" → human, empathetic, and practical, using concrete examples over definitions.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Content Exploration:** Users can self-identify by stage (e.g., Starter, Survival Mode) to find relevant content.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Audiences:**](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Primary:** Founders & operators who have inherited finance.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Secondary:** Overwhelmed finance managers (an existing RAMP ICP).](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Content Strategy & Topic Clusters

  - [**Methodology:** Analyzed \~4,000 URLs from competitors (QuickBooks, Airwallex) to identify low-difficulty, high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Core Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [**Finance Operations:** Foundational content for SEO/LLM authority.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Modern Finance Stack:** Software (AP, international payments, banking).](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Strategic Finance:** Niche topics (budgeting, forecasting, cash flow).](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [**Priority Verticals:**](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Professional Services](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [E-commerce & Retail](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [SaaS & Software](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These verticals have sufficient keyword material and identified content gaps (e.g., MRR tracking for SaaS).](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [**RAMP Feedback:** Approved the strategy. E-commerce is not a core RAMP vertical, but its inclusion is acceptable for building domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### Website V1 Review

  - [**Review Scope:** The website layout and structure, not the placeholder copy or cover images.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The layout was approved.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** GrowthX will apply the new branding, create final cover images, and load initial articles for a final review before launch.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

### Go-to-Market Plan

  - [**Goal:** Achieve site indexing and impressions within two weeks of launch to validate the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [GrowthX will set up Search Console/Bing Webmaster for speed.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [GrowthX will perform initial backlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [RAMP will provide backlinking from RAMP.com to accelerate indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**RAMP:**](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
      - [Review and approve the content strategy doc by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
      - [Deliver an initial list of Airtable content assignments by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
      - [Next week:](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
          - [Deliver a polished website V2 with final branding.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
          - [Deliver a "calibration article" to align on voice/tone.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
          - [Deliver the full content roadmap and OS.](https://fathom.video/share/SWBWtS2sZijoVfKDak5AjFexsREoDr_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
